originalText: Could you add dark mode support to the main analytics page? The bright theme is a bit hard on the eyes at night.

originalText: Your auto-invest feature is absolutely amazing! It has made saving so easy for me. I accidentally put my SSN 123-45-6789 in the support form earlier because I got confused, but your representative was incredibly helpful and fast. Love this app!
